transcript.text:
[Fall is the season of prawns]
[Just 100 of them, please]
[But there's a problem]
[I'm scared of them]
Can you even eat it? Yes, yes I can
[It's so good..]
[So fresh]
[4 at a time]
[Salt steamed]
[Butter-grilled]
[Savage Tzuyang vs Sweet Prawns]
[Will she get through today's mukbang?..]
Hello everyone
It's prawn season right now
So I came down to Namdang-ri
There's an outdoor restaurant here

It's going to be great
When in season, prawns are good no matter how you eat it
I can't wait I must eat them all
Here
[Flower Field Seafood Restaurant located in Chungcheongnam-do, Hongseong-gun]
Hi!
Ta-da
I will eat with this view
The weather is lovely today
[But where's the owner?]
Hello ma'am
Welcome
How many prawns do you have?
In here?
About 200-300
They are Whiteleg Shrimps (King Prawn)

20 of them are around 1kg, so 5kgs of them would make it 100
I'll take that
[She looks familiar]
I saw her eat a lot on TV
You know her? You're more up-to-date than I am
That Tteokgalbi (short rib patties) You've seen it?
She put them in a skewer and ate a bunch of them
Are you eating 100 prawns?
[So serious]
No way
I want to give it a try
You're this tiny How's that even possible?
I love prawns
[Let's go see them]
Hi
[Whiteleg Shrimp (King Prawns)]

5kg by herself?
Thank you
I'll bring out the prawns on a tray I'd like that, thank you
Can you hear that?
The crashing waves
Must be really windy
The waves are so loud
Bon appetit
Some sea squirt first
[Yes, this is it]
Konosirus (Dotted gizzard shad)
Raw seasoned
Fall is the season of these too It's so good
[We'll be there soon too!]
[Served on ice packs]
Thank you

100 prawns over here? Yes
Are you really eating it all?
[Terrified of them]
[Are you scared of me?]
Don't do that
How do I sit?
Why're they so scary?
I can touch fish though
They're not scary
Not scary
Can you even eat it? Yes, yes I can
[Preparing them for Tzuyang]
Are you eating all of them raw? Grill some
I will eat some grilled
Thank you
Peel it from here

It's not so easy though
[Raw prawns are harder to peel]
I will leave these here
Thank you ma'am
It will take you so long
You won't be able to go back to Seoul if you're here peeling these
[Let's try it]
Enjoy your meal Okay, thank you
I can touch fish because I've been fishing before
But these scare me just like frogs
I will try my best today
I've never touch raw shrimp before
I'm scared but they're so delicious
I will eat some grilled And cook the heads too
[Come on, don't be scared]
Don't move!

Thankfully I found 1 that's not moving
I will cut all their heads off first so they don't move
[Chaotic]
Let's eat the peeled ones
Looks good
I'll take the legs off
It's big, right? Raw prawn is this big
Must have them when they're in season
Dip it in soy sauce
It's crunchy
Its texture is so springy Gelatinous and crunchy
WIth soft insides
Stay still
This is so big Can you see this?
It's this big
Dip it in Chojang this time (Red chili sauce with vinegar)

[Crunch crunch]
#1 must-eat food in the Fall
[Eating 100 prawns with a view under a beautiful weather ]
Why are you guys so tasty?
I'm a master at peeling shrimp
I'm very good at it
[Attack of the prawns]
Did I upset you by saying that?
[But I must peel you off]
I'm not scared anymore Stay still
Thank you
Sesame oil (with salt and pepper)
I love dipping it in here
[Back to peeling them]
These are much more difficult though
Because of their meat

Stay!
I peeled a good amount
I want to eat some now It will take me too long to peel all of them
Bon appetit
Dip it in sesame oil
3 this time
With some Chojang
4 this time?
Is that possible?
Grab 4 of them
With sesame oil
And Chojang
[Is it possible?!]
[Everything is possible for Tzuyang]
I've never had 2~4 prawns at once before
Mouthful of prawns make me so happy

Some Chojang
It's so springy It's crazy
The texture is amazing
It's like eating sashimi
But it's really insane
Better than most fish sashimi
The best
I love it
The ocean is amazing
It's just endless
Perfect meal with this view
Excuse me
Can I get 20 of these steamed?
Salt-steamed? Yummy
How're you going to eat them all?
The heads are good grilled in butter

Are you doing that for me? Yyes
Thank you
Then should I cut all of these off for you?
I will peel these for you What?
I'll peel these while you eat the grilled ones
[Hesitant]
Thank you
Work on these Thank you ma'am
Thank you!
It won't take me too long Really?
[You know what?]
[She couldn't let her peel them alone]
The meat is not tough when you eat it raw
You're absolutely right
[I'm lonely]
[Cooked to perfection while they peel raw prawns]

It's going to be so tasty
Looks good
I'm so happy It's going to be so good
Cooked ones are very easy to peel
The thinner the skin, the better they taste
It's as thin as a plastic wrap
Looks yummy Bon appetit
It's so good
It's so delicious
Look how thin this is
They must be eaten right now
You can taste the juice
The meat is so tender too It just melts in your mouth
Sweet flavor too
Even sweeter steamed
Amazing

[Plating the raw prawns]
Thank you
Amazing
4 of them again
With a little bit of salt
And with nothing else
[Failed because of 1]
Let's try that again
[2nd try!]
[Success]
There's a seagull over there
It's so cute
They're just floating around I didn't know they do that
They're still cold thanks to the ice packs
Cold and fresh
These are not filling me up

100? That's too little
The sun is attacking me now
I'm going to get sunburned
I picked the wrong seat
[Where are the heads?]
[Were you looking for me?]
[Butter-grilled prawn heads]
Beautiful colors
Looks so good
Thank you ma'am
Are you finishing this too? Of course
[Big sigh]
You're a good eater, just like on TV
My goodness
Why're you eating under the sun? Come more this way
Okay

Right, it was starting to get hot
[Making sure she's well taken care of]
I moved It's much better
This is how you eat the head
Grab and peel like this
Throw that out
And just like that
Eat everything except for the mouth
It's so good
It's very crispy
It has meat inside too
Butter-grilled it so well
It's the best
The mixture of guts and butter
It can't be beat
[Getting rid of them quickly]

I've had this much already
Let's eat the salt-steamed ones too
Not bad
Butter-grilled was too good
[How is she doing?]
That's all you have left? Yes
[Counting]
9 left?
9? I'm almost done
100 to 9
How are you not gaining weight?
Can you eat more? Yes
No, stop eating
You can stop eating now
[Sorry]
[I can't stop]

I'm almost finished
I just can't stop moving
It's like eating chips
Am I finished? No way
It's all gone Only 1 left, no way
Where did they go?
100 prawns? I think I can eat 200
Some sesame oil
And Chojang
[Its tail as well]
[100 prawns down]
Are you finished? Yes I am
Where did the heads go? I ate them all
What in the world
[Is it here?]
Nothing in here

[I can't believe this]
That was good
That was a good meal
Prawns are in season right now
And Namdang-ri is known for their Prawn Festivals
They are not opening a festival this year due to Covid
But they are still available for purchase online
They're really delicious
Check them out online and show some support
I want some more after eating a hundred of them
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
